info.title: GitGuardian API
info.description: GitGuardian provides automated secret detection and remediation for code security. The API enables secret scanning, incident management, honeytoken management, team and member administration, source management, and audit logging.

get.description: Check the health of the API and validate your API token.

200.description: API is healthy and token is valid.

post.description: Scan a piece of content (code, configuration, etc.) for exposed secrets and credentials.
Scan multiple pieces of content for exposed secrets in a single request.

get.description: Retrieve the current quota overview for your account.
Retrieve a list of all available secret detectors.
Retrieve details for a specific secret detector.
Retrieve a paginated list of internal secret incidents.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Sort field, prefix with - for descending.

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific internal secret incident.

patch.description: Update attributes of an internal secret incident.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of honeytokens with optional filtering.

post.description: Create a new honeytoken for detecting unauthorized access.

ApiKey.name: Authorization
ApiKey.description: GitGuardian API key passed via the Authorization header as 'Token <api_key>'.

filename.description: Filename of the document being scanned.
